stemHtml: What is the requirement for securing the passenger cabin and galleys?

options.a: The commander shall ensure that before take-off and landing, and whenever deemed necessary in the interest of safety, all equipment and baggage are properly secured.
options.b: The operator shall ensure that before take-off and landing, and whenever deemed necessary in the interest of safety, all equipment and baggage are properly secured.
options.c: The SCCM shall ensure that before take-off and landing, and whenever deemed necessary in the interest of safety, all equipment and baggage are properly secured.
options.d: The commander shall ensure that before take-off and landing, all equipment and baggage are properly secured. Galleys are secured at the discretion of the SCCM.
